description: This file defines API route handlers related to roles in a web application backend. It includes endpoints for fetching role industries, skills, titles, autocomplete suggestions, and performing role searches, including integration with an external recommendations service and Bedrock AI.

methods.name: _normalizeLabel(v)
methods.description: Normalizes a display string for stable sorting and deduplication by trimming whitespace and collapsing internal whitespace.

methods.name: _sortCaseInsensitive(a, b)
methods.description: Sorts two strings in a case-insensitive manner.

methods.name: _loadRolesForFilterOptions()
methods.description: Loads role data from the database or fallback seed catalog to generate filter options.

methods.name: router.get('/industries')
methods.description: Fetches distinct industry labels from loaded roles.

methods.name: router.get('/skills')
methods.description: Fetches distinct skills from loaded roles.

methods.name: _deriveUniqueTitlesFromRoles(roles)
methods.description: Extracts and deduplicates role titles from role objects.

methods.name: router.get('/titles')
methods.description: Fetches distinct role titles for filters.

methods.name: router.get('/job-titles')
methods.description: Provides a backward-compatible endpoint returning role titles.

methods.name: router.get('/autocomplete')
methods.description: Provides role title suggestions for autocomplete, driven by Bedrock AI.

methods.name: router.get('/search')
methods.description: Performs role search, integrating with Bedrock AI for targeted role generation.
